title: Qlothos

'''Qlothos''' was an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a [[Cloud/Legends|cloudy]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']] detected unusual transmissions from the nearby Qlothos that resembled those made by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Acting on the suspicion that the signals indicated the presence of a Rebel [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], [[Senior Lieutenant/Legends|Senior Lieutenant]] [[Leeds]] ordered a [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] [[Attack on Qlothos|strike]] on the planet. However, one of the [[Bomber/Legends|bombers']] [[Concussion missile/Legends|missiles]] veered off target and destroyed a residential community, causing the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of nearly sixty [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] citizens, including a prominent [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Unidentified Kuat Drive Yards engineer|engineer]]. The [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jovan Vharing]], who had been [[Sleep/Legends|asleep]] when the attack was carried out, was subsequently executed for Leeds' blunder.

==Description==
Qlothos was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Journal11" /> located in the [[Qlothos system/Legends|Qlothos system]], a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> It had a [[Cloud/Legends|cloudy]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] that could interfere with the [[identification beacon]]s built into the [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]] of the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]].<ref name="Journal11" />

==History==
[[File:JovanVharing.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Captain Jovan Vharing (pictured) was executed for the disastrous attack on Qlothos ordered by his senior lieutenant Leeds.]]
By [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="3 ABY">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of {{JournalCite|11|The Longest Fall}} to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> a high-ranking [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Unidentified Kuat Drive Yards engineer|engineer]] was visiting the [[Unidentified capital city (Qlothos)|capital]] of Qlothos on a holiday with his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] and two [[Gender/Legends|sons]]. At the same [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Interrogator/Legends|''Interrogator'']] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was stationed near the planet. While the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|starship's]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Jovan Vharing]], was [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]], [[Senior Lieutenant/Legends|Senior Lieutenant]] [[Leeds]] detected unusual transmissions from Qlothos on a frequency that was highly similar to a set of previously intercepted transmission codes used by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative.<ref name="Journal11" /> Erroneusly<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|56|Qlothos}}</ref> believing that the transmissions indicated the existence of a secret Alliance [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], Leeds dispatched a full [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of TIE/sa [[Bomber/Legends|bombers]] to [[Attack on Qlothos|destroy]] it.<ref name="Journal11" />

Due to interference from the planet's atmosphere, one of the bombers' concussion [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] veered off target and hit a secluded section of a residential community situated a [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]] from the location of the suspected Rebel facility, destroying the latter. As a result, almost sixty civilians, most of whom were prominent Imperial citizens<ref name="Journal11" /> and officials<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> and which included the Kuat Drive Yards engineer and his family, were [[Death/Legends|killed]]. After the casualties of the attack had been determined, Leeds awakened Vharing, and, mere [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] later, while the ''Interrogator'' was moving in to investigate the ''[[Nharqis'I]]'' [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]]<ref name="Journal11" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA" /> in 3 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="3 ABY" /> the captain was summoned to meet Imperial [[High Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]], who promptly executed him.<ref name="Journal11" />

==Inhabitants==
Qlothos was a defenseless<ref name="Journal11" /> resort world.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Locations==
Qlothos had a [[Capital/Legends|capital]] and a residential community.<ref name="Journal11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Qlothos was first mentioned in the short story "[[The Longest Fall]]," which was written by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] and published in the [[November]] [[1996]] [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|eleventh issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine.<ref name="Journal11" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Qlothos [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet, in grid square M-14.<ref name="TEA" />
